benefits.description: Anxiety and stress reduced, tension in body released
Improved focus, not hyper-focusing on unnecessary tasks, getting things done faster without burnout
Increased motivation and follow-through, reduced overwhelm, better task completion
Helps with social anxiety when taken before events

protocol_notes: Dosing range explored: 100-300 mcg. Started with Selank first, then added Semax. Initial 100mcg Selank dosage showed minimal effects. User prefers subcutaneous over nasal based on anecdotal reports that SubQ requires approximately half the nasal dosage. Effects described as subtle and retrospectively noticeable rather than immediately apparent.
